subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Sacred Threshold! Thy letter dated the 25th of the month of Rajab 339, numbered 325, hath been received [3.5s]... ...It is my hope that means may be devised for Iran that would lead to universal comfort and assurance, that justice and equity may prevail
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده آستان مقدس نامه ایکه بتاریخ ۲۵ شهر رجب ۳۳۹ نمره ۳۲۵ بود رسید
subcodes.subjects: @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @promotion of commerce and industry, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @non-participation in politics
